description.id: Sistem manajemen tiket helpdesk multi-platform untuk mengoptimalkan layanan support dengan pelacakan SLA otomatis, knowledge base, dan metrik kinerja real-time.
description.en: A multi-platform helpdesk ticketing system to optimize support services with automated SLA tracking, knowledge base, and real-time performance metrics.

subtitle.id: Platform cerdas untuk mengeliminasi duplikasi tugas, mempercepat waktu respons, dan memantau kinerja agent secara terpusat. Dikembangkan dengan metodologi Scrum.
subtitle.en: A smart platform to eliminate duplicate tasks, accelerate response times, and centrally monitor agent performance. Developed using Agile Scrum methodology.

content.id: Sebelum adanya TIXDESK, penanganan keluhan sering kali kacau: support agent mengerjakan keluhan yang duplikat, tidak ada penentuan skala prioritas sehingga request penting terlewat, waktu respons yang lambat, dan tidak adanya database solusi (knowledge base). Selain itu, pihak manajemen tidak memiliki metrik ukur kinerja yang jelas terhadap efektivitas tim support.
content.en: Prior to TIXDESK, complaint handling was chaotic: support agents worked on duplicate issues, lack of prioritization caused critical requests to be missed, response times were slow, and there was no solution database (knowledge base). Furthermore, management lacked clear metrics to measure the effectiveness of the support team.

desc.id: Dashboard interaktif memantau volume tiket, Average Resolution Time, SLA Compliance Rate, dan nilai CSAT.
desc.en: Interactive dashboard monitoring ticket volume, Average Resolution Time, SLA Compliance, and CSAT scores.

desc.id: Artikel solusi (FAQ) otomatis disarankan saat user membuat tiket, berpotensi memotong 40% tiket berulang.
desc.en: Solution articles (FAQ) auto-suggested during ticket creation, potentially reducing repetitive tickets by 40%.

desc.id: Countdown SLA real-time dengan alert peringatan dan eskalasi otomatis ke Support Lead jika melampaui batas waktu.
desc.en: Real-time SLA countdowns with warning alerts and auto-escalation to Support Leads if breached.

desc.id: ID Tiket unik, status tracking (Open-Closed), threaded comments, attachment file, dan prioritas otomatis.
desc.en: Unique Ticket IDs, status tracking (Open-Closed), threaded comments, file attachments, and automated priorities.

content.id: TIXDESK mendukung alur kerja end-to-end yang mulus: End User membuat tiket -> Support Agent mengambil & memproses tiket -> Tiket berstatus Resolved. Jika masalah belum tuntas, user dapat mengajukan 'Re-Open'. Sistem ini membagi akses menjadi 4 peran spesifik: End User (tracking & self-service), Support Agent (penanganan tiket), Support Lead (assign & eskalasi), dan Admin (konfigurasi sistem & SLA).
content.en: TIXDESK supports a seamless end-to-end workflow: End Users create tickets -> Support Agents claim & process them -> Tickets are marked Resolved. If unresolved, users can request a 'Re-Open'. The system separates access into 4 specific roles: End User (tracking), Support Agent (handling), Support Lead (escalation), and Admin (SLA configuration).

description.id: Platform responsif pemantau gempa bumi real-time dengan integrasi API BMKG, pemetaan interaktif, dan notifikasi kebencanaan cerdas.
description.en: A real-time earthquake monitoring responsive platform with BMKG API integration, interactive mapping, and smart disaster notifications.

subtitle.id: Menghadirkan informasi kegempaan langsung dari BMKG dengan visualisasi peta dinamis, analisis historis, dan peringatan instan untuk seluruh masyarakat Indonesia.
subtitle.en: Delivering live earthquake information from BMKG with dynamic map visualization, historical analysis, and instant alerts for the Indonesian public.

content.id: Meskipun informasi gempa sangat krusial bagi masyarakat Indonesia, banyak platform web yang tersedia saat ini kurang intuitif, sulit dipahami secara visual, dan tidak memfasilitasi peringatan instan secara personal. QuakeAlert dibangun agar masyarakat merasa lebih aman, *aware*, dan nyaman dalam memantau kondisi gempa kapan saja melalui antarmuka yang modern dan responsif.
content.en: Although earthquake information is highly crucial for Indonesians, many currently available web platforms are counter-intuitive, visually difficult to understand, and lack personalized instant alerts. QuakeAlert was built so the public feels safer, more aware, and comfortable monitoring earthquake conditions anytime through a modern, responsive interface.

desc.id: Menarik API BMKG secara real-time dan otomatis memetakan/mengelompokkan lokasi kejadian berdasarkan provinsi dari data koordinat.
desc.en: Fetches real-time BMKG API and automatically maps/groups incident locations by province based on coordinate data.

desc.id: Menampilkan titik lokasi gempa di peta dengan indikator visual yang membedakan besaran magnitudo dan jam kejadian secara akurat.
desc.en: Displays earthquake pinpoint locations on a map with visual indicators differentiating magnitude sizes and exact event times.

desc.id: Halaman analitik khusus yang menggabungkan data gempa lampau dan terbaru, menampilkan tren historis berbasis dot-matrix dan grafik.
desc.en: A dedicated analytics page combining past and recent earthquake data, displaying historical trends via dot-matrix and statistical graphs.

desc.id: Mendukung notifikasi push langsung di browser tanpa login, serta notifikasi via Email bagi pengguna yang terdaftar.
desc.en: Supports direct push notifications in the browser without login, as well as Email notifications for registered users.

content.id: Aplikasi ini dirancang untuk bekerja secara otonom. Saat ada gempa terbaru, backend ASP.NET Core akan menarik data, menyimpannya di PostgreSQL, lalu menampilkannya secara langsung di peta frontend React. Pengguna terbagi menjadi dua: Guest (mendapat visualisasi penuh & push notif web) dan Non-Guest/Login (mendapat tambahan perlindungan berupa notifikasi langsung ke Email mereka saat terjadi gempa).
content.en: The application is designed to work autonomously. Upon a new earthquake, the ASP.NET Core backend fetches the data, saves it in PostgreSQL, and reflects it live on the React frontend map. Users are divided into two categories: Guests (full visualization & web push notifs) and Non-Guests/Logged-in (additional protection via direct Email alerts when quakes occur).

description.id: Platform manajemen fasilitas dan peminjaman ruangan kampus berbasis web responsif yang mengeliminasi birokrasi kertas melalui validasi jadwal otomatis dan sistem multi-tenant.
description.en: A responsive web-based campus facility and room booking platform that eliminates paper bureaucracy through automated schedule validation and a multi-tenant system.

subtitle.id: Sistem peminjaman ruang independen yang mentransformasi pencatatan manual menjadi platform terpusat. Dibangun secara utuh mulai dari arsitektur backend hingga deployment frontend di Vercel.
subtitle.en: An independent room booking system transforming manual recording into a centralized platform. Built entirely from backend architecture to frontend deployment on Vercel.

content.id: Proses peminjaman ruangan di lingkungan kampus umumnya masih menggunakan kertas yang rentan hilang atau terselip. Hal ini menyebabkan alur kerja yang tidak efisien—jadwal sering terlewat, data peminjaman tidak terekap dengan baik, dan sangat rentan terjadi bentrok jadwal antar civitas akademika. SmartRoom dibangun untuk mengatasi kekacauan ini dengan menyediakan sistem pemantauan yang transparan dan *real-time*.
content.en: The room booking process in campus environments typically still relies on paper, which is prone to being lost or misplaced. This leads to inefficient workflows—schedules are often missed, booking data is poorly recorded, and it is highly susceptible to scheduling conflicts among the academic community. SmartRoom was built to overcome this chaos by providing a transparent and real-time monitoring system.

desc.id: End-user (Mahasiswa/Dosen) dapat melihat ketersediaan ruang secara live dan mengajukan form peminjaman anti-bentrok.
desc.en: End-users (Students/Lecturers) can view live room availability and submit clash-free booking forms.

desc.id: Staf/Admin memiliki kontrol untuk menyetujui atau menolak reservasi, serta menambah dan mengelola inventaris ruangan.
desc.en: Staff/Admins have control to approve or reject reservations, as well as add and manage room inventory.

desc.id: Manajemen otentikasi global untuk menambahkan institusi kampus baru dan mendistribusikan kode unik login aplikasi.
desc.en: Global authentication management to provision new campus institutions and distribute unique app login codes.

content.id: Aplikasi memfasilitasi alur kerja terintegrasi: Pengguna memilih ruang -> Backend ASP.NET Core memvalidasi ketersediaan waktu -> Admin meninjau pengajuan (Approve/Reject). Di lapisan teratas, Super Admin bertindak sebagai pemegang kendali ekosistem, memetakan pengguna ke segmentasi kampus mereka masing-masing agar data di dalam database tetap terisolasi dan aman untuk setiap institusi.
content.en: The application facilitates an integrated workflow: Users select a room -> The ASP.NET Core backend validates time availability -> Admins review the submission (Approve/Reject). At the top layer, the Super Admin acts as the ecosystem controller, mapping users to their respective campus segments to ensure database data remains isolated and secure for each institution.
